BARRIERS · 06 OF 08
The three barriers

What blocks enterprise AI today.
And how we answer it.

The challenge
The opportunity
Arda's answer
Access to the right data
Core systems are off-limits to public cloud AI. Security blocks adoption before it starts.
Increased adoption through value-driven projects, on the data that actually matters.
Sovereign platform linked to existing systems.
Security & trust
Pilots create new perimeters and new vendor risk reviews. Same posture, more surface.
No new trust boundary. Same security posture and controls.
Runs entirely inside your environment.
Cost & ROI
Token-based pricing is unpredictable. Hard to build a board-level payback case.
Predictable and scalable costs. Better economics at scale.
Open-weight models on dedicated GPU. Flat costs as usage grows.
CONFIDENTIAL · ARDA × ACME 06 / 08
